description: §41.16.2 — the rows= attribute is required on every <tableFor>. Its absence fires E-TABLEFOR-ROWS-MISSING.
rationale: §41.16.2: rows= SHALL be present on every <tableFor> element; absence is E-TABLEFOR-ROWS-MISSING (a type mismatch on a present rows= is the sibling E-TABLEFOR-ROWS-WRONG-TYPE).
